contact.title: Let's talk about people, systems, or both.
contact.text: Open to HR consulting engagements, workflow automation projects, and conversations about analytics in HR. Based in Lagos, working with teams anywhere.

register.title: HR Practice
register.desc: Leave management, training needs assessments, capacity development plans — the human side of operations.

register.title: Systems & Automation
register.desc: Apps Script, Google Sheets and Netlify forms turned into procurement, mail, and leave workflows staff actually use.

register.title: HR & Data Analytics
register.desc: Turning attendance, performance and survey data into dashboards leadership can act on.

register.title: Accompaniment
register.desc: Writing on transformation, ethics at work, and meeting people where they are — grounded in Catholic social teaching.

about.title: A practitioner's approach
about.note: Methodology over magic — the right tool for where a team is, not the most sophisticated one.
paragraphs: I work at the intersection of human resources, IT administration, and organisational development — currently at Whitesands School in Lagos, where I split my time between HR operations, internal IT support, and building the digital workflows that keep the school's administration running.

Outside of my core role, I take on HR consulting engagements — training needs assessments, individual capacity development plans, integrity training — and I'm building a second track in data and HR analytics, working toward an MBA and a portfolio of applied analytics projects through 2026.

I also facilitate doctrinal catechism classes, drawing on case studies and the Catechism of the Catholic Church — a different kind of "people development," but one that shapes how I think about ethics, dignity, and change at work.
about.quote: Accompaniment is the missing word in every transformation conversation — meeting people where they are, and walking alongside them, one step at a time.

work.title: Experience
work.note: Selected roles and engagements — full history in the CV.

items.description: Manage HR operations and internal IT support, and design the digital systems staff use day to day.
bullets: Built a leave and absence management system with coordinator reassignment and mobile-friendly staff access
Designed a front desk mail and document workflow across reception, EA, principal, and staff roles
Currently building a multi-role procurement and requisition system with routing logic between procurement officers

items.description: Delivered Individual Capacity Development Plans for 11 staff members, with automated Gmail notifications and an Excel export pipeline built on Google Sheets and Apps Script.
Prepare and deliver case-study based catechism sessions grounded in the Catechism of the Catholic Church.

projects.title: Selected work
projects.note: Systems, dashboards and analyses — filter by area.

items.title: Procurement & Requisition System
items.description: A multi-role requisition register with routing logic between procurement officers, built on Google Apps Script, Sheets and Netlify-hosted forms.

items.title: HR Leave & Absence Management
items.description: End-to-end leave workflow with coordinator reassignment, deductible leave logic, and a mobile-friendly staff portal with QR sharing.
items.stack: APPS SCRIPT · HTML SERVICE · GMAIL API

items.title: Front Desk Mail & Document Workflow
items.description: Four-role document routing system (reception, EA, principal, staff) with Drive uploads, image compression, and archive controls.

items.title: Individual Capacity Development Plans
items.description: Training needs assessment for 11 staff translated into structured ICDPs, with automated tracking and reporting.

items.title: Staff Wellbeing & Benefits Review
items.description: Comparative analysis of Nigerian HMO providers for retail family cover, mapping plans against staff locations and needs.

items.title: Side-Income Financial Modelling
items.description: Month-by-month yield projections for a cattle resale model and cooperative investment club, built around real savings constraints.

items.title: Attrition Risk Explorer
items.description: In progress — a classification model flagging early attrition risk from HR dataset features, built as part of the 2026 analytics portfolio.

items.title: Survey Sentiment Classifier
items.description: In progress — classifying open-ended staff survey responses into sentiment categories to surface themes for leadership.

hero.subtitle: I'm Stan — an HR practitioner, people development consultant, and workflow automation builder. I design HR programmes, write about organisational change, and build the everyday tools (registers, dashboards, trackers) that help teams run better.

writing.title: Articles & notes
writing.note: On accompaniment, transformation, and people-first work.

items.title: Accompaniment: The Missing Word in Every Transformation Conversation
items.excerpt: On why meeting people where they are matters more than choosing the most sophisticated tool.
